title: Decharted
description: Decharted is a mod based around the corruption of the world, this mod allows multiple ways for the player to send their friends (or foes), to a separate dimension to have them stuck. You may also be able to spawn trap players before they die and respawn.
body:
New Dimension : Decharter, Layer 2, and Layer 3.

New Resource : Ink Resin, Ink resin can only be found on the outside of decayed trees and randomly generates, resin can be used to make armor which is slightly more powerful than netherite, but highly expensive to make.

New Items : Ink Resin, Undried Ink Resin, Ink, Solid Ink, Blood, Ink Resin Ore, Decayed Logs, Wood, and Planks, Ink Resin Bricks, Ink Resin Block, Ink Resin Armor Set, Axolotl Bones, Sinister Totem, Sinister Effigy, Altar, Ink hearts (deactivated and activated).

The Sinister Effigy : Crafting the Sinister Effigy grants you the power of converting the world into ink. Once right clicked, Ink rain will pour down for 30 minutes and convert blocks into solid ink. 

The Sinister Totem : When right-clicking the item below 4 hearts, you will be given the effect "Inkification", Inkification allows you to shoot an ink ball that converts block it hits into ink, The next power is if you are in ink, Pressing The Ink Invisibility Key will allow you to be invisible for a short amount of time. Blocks Around you will convert into ink also.

!WARNING!  THERE IS CURRENTLY NO WAY TO DEFEAT THE INK INFECTION, DO NOT START THE INFECTION UNLESS YOU WANT YOUR ENTIRE WORLD INFECTED

These new items and resources allow the player to convert their world and take over to their hearts content. Whether you want to save your friends and be the hero, or if you want to convert the world, take over and be the villain, each way this mod allows you to do just that! 



INSPIRED BY DOCTOR4T'S MOD, DEFILE
INSPIRED BY ARATHAIN'S MOD, CHARTER

Feel Free to suggest any changes or ideas in the comments!
